info.description:
V1 Hound Media Server API Documentation
While in beta, please expect breaking api changes in short/no notice
info.title: Hound API Documentation V1

parameters.description: Media Type eg. tvshow or movie
parameters.name: media_type

parameters.description: Encoded Stream String - get from Query providers
parameters.name: encodedString

get.summary: Get Movie Media Files by ID

put.description: Set the default provider profiles for streaming, downloading. Note that clients may choose to override their own defaults.

get.description: A streamable link for a video defined by the encodedString

post.description:
Adds a p2p torrent to the server for streaming/download.
Not strictly necessary, as calling stream directly invokes this. May be deprecated in the future.

get.summary: Get Comments for a TV Show

post.summary: Post Comment for a TV Show

get.summary: Get TV Show Next Watch Action
Get TV Show Media Files by ID
Search Stream Providers for TV Shows by ID

get.description: Gets 20 most recent records added to any collection

post.description:
Only one of season_number and episode_number, or []episode_ids should be defined.
By default, if []episode_ids are used, this won't clear existing playback progress for
those episodes, however, this behavior might change in the future. For the season_number,
episode_number case, the current playback progress will be cleared if the watched_at is newer
than the existing playback progress.
Create new rewatch for tv show. This archives the previous watches, so user's can start fresh.

strict_match.description: whether if no match is found, to fail the download

destination_path.description: path to final destination in hound media dir

download_priority.description: priority of task, not used for now

download_protocol.description: p2p, http, external (not downloaded by hound)

record_id.description: episode or movie to be ingested

source_uri.description: magnet uri with trackers / http link

ancestor_id.description: reference to fk record_id of the show, for episodes

last_air_date.description: for shows, latest episode air date

media_source.description: tmdb, openlibrary, etc. the main metadata provider

media_title.description: movie, tvshow, season or episode title

next_air_date.description: for shows, next scheduled episode air date

overview.description: game of thrones is a show about ...

parent_id.description: reference to fk record_id, null for movie, tvshow

release_date.description: 2012-12-30, for shows/seasons - first_air_date, for episodes - air_date

sort_index.description: not in use yet, used to sort based on user preferences

thumbnail_uri.description: poster image for shows/movies, still image for episode

manifest_url.description: url to manifest.json for stremio providers

name.description: profile name, eg. Performance, Quality, etc.

media_source.description: tmdb, openlibrary, etc. the main metadata provider

media_title.description: movie, tvshow, season or episode title

overview.description: game of thrones is a show about ...

release_date.description: 2012-12-30, for shows/seasons - first_air_date, for episodes - air_date

media_source.description: tmdb, openlibrary, etc. the main metadata provider

media_title.description: movie, tvshow, season or episode title

overview.description: game of thrones is a show about ...

release_date.description: 2012-12-30, for shows/seasons - first_air_date, for episodes - air_date

episodes_watched.description: a show is included even though it's not completed

resize_mode.description: whether the video is zoomed to fill/normal, etc.

next_episode.description: only for next episode watch action type

watch_progress.description: only for resume watch action type

current_progress_seconds.description: how many seconds in the user is

last_watched_at.description: last unix time when the playback progress was set

total_duration_seconds.description: total duration of the media in seconds

encoded_data.description: data encoded in AES for playing streams in hound

uri.description: magnet link, http link, or file path

season_number.description: only for tvshows, when commenting on a particular episode

strict_match.description: whether if no match is found, to fail the download

last_air_date.description: for shows, latest episode air date

next_air_date.description: for shows, next scheduled episode air date

last_air_date.description: for shows, latest episode air date

next_air_date.description: for shows, next scheduled episode air date

last_air_date.description: for shows, latest episode air date
